response:
[THE CORE TASK IS TO COMPUTE THE DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION BETWEEN CHEMISTRY AND BIOLOGY TESTS]  
[THE BIOLOGY TEST HAS 25 QUESTIONS AND 45 MINUTES, WHICH IS 2700 SECONDS]  
[THE CHEMISTRY TEST HAS 20 QUESTIONS AND 60 MINUTES, WHICH IS 3600 SECONDS]  
[THE TIME PER QUESTION FOR BIOLOGY IS 2700 DIVIDED BY 25, WHICH IS 108 SECONDS]  
[THE TIME PER QUESTION FOR CHEMISTRY IS 3600 DIVIDED BY 20, WHICH IS 180 SECONDS]  
[THE DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION IS 180 MINUS 108, WHICH IS 72 SECONDS]  
[THE ANSWER IS 72 SECONDS]  
[THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD]  
[THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD]  
[THE RESPONSE ENDS WITH THE SAME WORD AS IT STARTS]
